services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive software development services for modern businesses

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Custom web applications built with modern frameworks like Next.js, React, and Node.js. Fast, responsive, and scalable.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Beautiful, performant, and user-friendly.

items.title: Custom Software & ERP
items.description: Tailor-made business software, ERP systems, and internal tools that streamline your operations.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: Connect your existing systems, APIs, and third-party services for seamless data flow across your organization.

items.title: Cloud Solutions
items.description: Cloud architecture, deployment, and DevOps services using AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Ongoing maintenance, updates, bug fixes, and technical support to keep your software running smoothly.

about.title: About KNT Technology
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in software development

story.title: Our Story
story.content: KNT Technology Co., Ltd. was founded with a simple mission: to help businesses leverage technology to achieve their goals. We are a team of passionate software engineers, designers, and consultants dedicated to building software that makes a real difference.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower businesses with custom software solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and innovation.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the trusted technology partner for businesses across Thailand and Southeast Asia, delivering software that creates lasting value.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: We never compromise on the quality of our work.

items.title: Client Success
items.description: Your success is our success. We're invested in your growth.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We embrace new technologies to deliver better solutions.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear communication and honest relationships with every client.
